sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55003" key="ka/tarcis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτ-αρξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n55003.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beginning</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ πάθους</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
